basics.name: Nuthan Reddy
basics.label: Lead Data & Software Engineer | Data Governance | Distributed Systems
basics.summary:
Lead Software Engineer, avid learner and tech enthusiast, passionate about building scalable and reliable systems.
Since 2015

highlights: Led end-to-end SDLC for scalable data catalog for asset discovery, deletion and compliance tagging across 28B+ assets and 64 asset types in Microsoft.

Designed a generic Facet Processing Framework for different Privacy Programs. Developed the Privacy Signals program for data deletion, export delivery, processing, and compliance reporting at enterprise scale.

Architected Agent based Investigation and Remediation framework for incidents, reducing mean time to resolution by almost half and in some cases this entirely eliminated the need for manual intervention.
Redesigned distributed scan bottlenecks to deliver 2-20x performance gains, improving data freshness from 8 days to 24 hours.
Defined and enforced Data Contracts across DataMap, DataGrid, and Trust360, reducing live-site incidents by 50% and improving recovery time by 80%.
Mentored junior engineers and improved team effectiveness through design discussions and distributed systems coaching.
Contributed to a modular, rule-based, config-driven data platform for Enterprise Business Services teams.
Optimized Spark data processing jobs, reducing execution time by ~30% and improving resource utilization.
Built a Go-based Code Freeze app integrating Slack and GitHub to automate deployment governance workflows.
Sole developer of a planet-scale OpenX Prebid streaming pipeline supporting 100k req/sec and 1GB/sec throughput, presented at ApacheCon NA 2020.
Improved reliability and reduced costs by implementing circuit-breaker patterns and optimizing resource usage.
Led BigQuery-based NitroDB implementation, achieving ~30% cost reduction while maintaining performance.
Built multi-tenant discovery/search capabilities with Elasticsearch for high-speed data exploration.
Contributed critical bug fixes to the official spark-snowflake connector, improving data correctness.
Implemented sieve-based query optimization features in NitroDB to improve query efficiency.
Migrated business logic from Teradata to Hive for a leading energy client and optimized workloads using partitioning, file formats, and cost-based optimization.
Built a real-time sensor analytics pipeline using Spark Streaming, NiFi, HBase and Power BI to predict oil well failures.
Developed custom Java UDFs to optimize complex transformations and close platform feature gaps.

projects.name: Azure Data Governance
description: Led Privacy Signals Team — data deletion, export delivery, and compliance at enterprise scale
Optimized Data Scan for 2-20x improvement; reduced data freshness from 8 days to 24 hours

Established Data Contracts across DataMap, DataGrid, Trust360 — halved live-site incidents, 80% faster TTR

projects.name: NitroDB on BigQuery

Migrated NitroDB to BigQuery, reducing costs by 30%

projects.name: NitroDB Search

Built ETL pipeline and managed Snowflake costs, permissions, and GCS integration
